calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for Court trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing on this day.
Dept. 218, Comm: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for Plaintiff: Emerald Fund, Inc. Plaintiff's witness: Vykky Gamble, was sworn and examined. No appearance by Defendant, Roland Domingo.
Exhibit 1--- Lease Agreement----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---3-day Notice---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Roland Domingo as follows:
Restitution and possession of premises located at 1045 Mission Street #439, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of lease.
Past due rent: $1080.00
Holdover damages: $612.00
Costs: $320.00
for a total of $2012.00
Counsel stipulated to the return of Exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
